scripts.dev:with-turn: npm run coturn:dev && concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:lan: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:host --workspace=frontend"
scripts.dev:lan:with-turn: npm run coturn:dev && npm run dev:lan
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend
